race.comment: GRAFFITI TYCOON (1) is third-up off two heavily bet near-misses at Canterbury and then at this track. Has a low barrier and Zac Lloyd sticks aboard. Has plenty of scope for improvement and is ready to win. CONDONE (2) resumes gelded and two back was narrowly beaten over 1200m at Canterbury on debut. That stacks right up and he owns an easy Randwick trial win. The blinkers are applied for the first time and a bold run is on the cards. KONSA (6) resumes and has trialled well here with race-ride JMac aboard. He'll also be naturally improved and has shown enough to suggest he's a hope. Stablemate YATTAZOU (10) resumed further improved with a near-miss at Canterbury. Maps for a soft run and has weight relief. Loses JMac, but the longer sprint suits. She will be within range at a big price.
